Automotive Software and Cyber Security

20

Within the scope of Winter Technology Talks'24, organized in cooperation with OPINA and UTAS, automotive software security and the measures that can be taken against cyber threats with the presentation of Nurhan Yağcı from AVL Türkiye Research and Engineering was concluded.

📅 Date: Wednesday, December 11, 2024

📍 Location: Ramazan Nejat Tuncay Conference Hall, Okan University
